subject: RouteWeather password reset
body:
Hello Casey,

A password reset has been requested for your RouteWeather account.
Reason: Support-assisted account recovery after email change

Use this reset link:
http://127.0.0.1:5173/reset-password?token=4iCYe7idZhzZaJoX8yd6aZGUD1-3QAgMFSl1F3VAEg4

This link expires in 120 minutes.
